title: Hibbent Pop up Sink Plug with Drain Strainer, Brass Bounce Core Push-Type Drain Plug, Suitable for 1.1'' to 2.36'' (28-60mm), Universal Sink Stopper Replacement for Bathroom Basin, Chrome
features: Convenient Operation: The push-button design makes it easy and quick to open and close the drain stopper, eliminating the need for twisting or tightening, allowing for effortless use.
Efficient Clogging Prevention: The built-in filter can capture hair, soap scum, and other debris, effectively reducing the risk of drain blockages and keeping the plumbing system clear.

High-Quality Materials: The drain stopper is primarily made of premium zinc alloy and brass, which are both rust-resistant and crack-resistant, and features a seamless design. It has strong rebound strength, allowing for fast drainage and quick sealing.

Wide Compatibility (Bathroom Basin Only): Suitable for bathroom basin drain holes with a diameter of 28mm to 60mm and a depth of over 1.89 inches (48 mm). The product comes with four rubber rings for adjustable fitting, ensuring a tight seal to meet various basin drainage needs.

Easy Installation: The pop-up sink drain stopper has a simple structure that requires no tools for installation; remove the old drain stopper and insert the new one. If you want to use it for larger sinkhole diameters, the included rubber rings can be used to increase the internal diameter of the stopper.
